name: com.box/box-mcp
title: Box
description: Files, folders, search, and Box AI - Box's official hosted MCP server with OAuth.

byoClient.guide:
Box does not allow automatic OAuth client registration on api.box.com. You create a Custom App once in the Box Developer Console and Wayland uses your credentials.

**1.** Open **app.box.com/developers/console** and sign in. (Personal Box accounts work for testing; Enterprise plans may require admin approval.)

**2.** Click **Create New App** → **Custom App** → **User Authentication (OAuth 2.0)**. Give it a name (e.g. *Wayland MCP*) and submit.

**3.** In the **Configuration** tab:
  - Under **OAuth 2.0 Redirect URIs**, add the URL Wayland shows below.
  - Under **Application Scopes**, enable: **Read all files and folders stored in Box**, **Write all files and folders stored in Box**, **Manage AI**, and **Manage Doc Gen templates**.
  - Click **Save Changes**.

**4.** Copy **Client ID** and **Client Secret** from the **OAuth 2.0 Credentials** section and paste them below.

**Note for Enterprise accounts:** if your admin has app authorization enabled, the app must be approved in **Admin Console → Apps → Custom Apps Manager** before the OAuth flow will succeed.

scopes.name: root_readwrite
scopes.plainLanguage: Read and write files and folders you select.

scopes.name: ai.readwrite
scopes.plainLanguage: Use Box AI to summarize and analyze content.

scopes.name: docgen.readwrite
scopes.plainLanguage: Generate documents with Box Doc Gen templates.
